name: Barry Callebaut AG
h1: Barry Callebaut's GCC footprint in India
lede: Barry Callebaut runs three capability centers across two Indian cities. Pune and Mumbai, covering manufacturing and sales & marketing, built over eleven years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Barry Callebaut office in India. We map three, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Barry Callebaut AG GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Barry Callebaut runs 3 verified GCC centers across 2 Indian cities (Pune, Mumbai), covering manufacturing and sales & marketing. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR and GCC leadership

about.description: Barry Callebaut's India footprint covers Pune and Mumbai, spanning manufacturing and sales & marketing. The centers deliver R&D and ER&D and Sales & Marketing for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all eighteen decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Barry Callebaut operate in India?
faq.a: Barry Callebaut operates 3 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Barry Callebaut have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Barry Callebaut's India GCC footprint spans Pune and Mumbai.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Barry Callebaut run in India?
faq.a: Barry Callebaut runs manufacturing and sales & marketing centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Barry Callebaut's India GCCs?
faq.a: Barry Callebaut's India centers employ in the 201 to 500 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Barry Callebaut's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 18 leaders at Barry Callebaut's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR and GCC leadership. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
